user.title: MXZ Coordinator
user.description: Select the two indoor heads on your MXZ outdoor unit and a temperature sensor for each room. The first head is the PRIMARY (it wins a heat-vs-cool standoff). Vane controls are detected automatically. Comfort thresholds, weather-based changeover, and fan boost are set afterward via the integration's Configure button.

data.notify_service: Drift-alert notifications (optional) — where to ping you when a head is knocked off its coordinated mode and the coordinator has to put it back

error.same_head: The primary and secondary heads must be different entities.

abort.already_configured: This pair of heads is already configured.

abort.empty_options: No settings were submitted; the existing configuration was kept.

init.title: MXZ Coordinator tuning
init.description: All temperatures are in your Home Assistant unit (°C or °F); the defaults adapt to it.

data.demand_threshold: Demand threshold S (° off-target before the shared mode may flip)
data.engage_deadband: Engage deadband D (° off-target before a head actively runs)
data.mode_hysteresis: Mode hysteresis (seconds minimum dwell before a heat↔cool flip)
data.resting_mode_bias: Resting mode when no room is calling
data.heat_lockout_floor: Heat-lockout safety floor (° — heat below this even when locked out)
data.cool_lockout_ceiling: Cool-lockout safety ceiling (° — cool above this even when locked out)
data.changeover_entity: Seasonal changeover weather/temperature entity (optional — auto-drives the lockouts from local weather)
data.fan_boost_enable: Fan boost: drive fan speed by how far the room is from target
data.primary_vane_vertical: Primary vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.primary_vane_horizontal: Primary horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.secondary_vane_vertical: Secondary vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.secondary_vane_horizontal: Secondary horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)

recompute.name: Recompute
recompute.description: Force the coordinator to recompute the plan and re-apply it to the heads now.
